quality.rationale: 完整多步基矢变换与协变导数推导，逻辑严密，属广义相对论基础理论构建题

origin.question: [文件 1: 1_s7_7.1.md]\n\nProblem 7.1. Show that the connection coefficients $\Gamma_{\beta \gamma}^{\alpha}$ do not obey the tensor transformation law.
origin.answer: The second term in this equation would not be present in a tensor transformation.
origin.solution:
Solution 7.1. Let the transformation be given by $\mathbf{e}_{\mu^{\prime}} = \mathbf{L}_{\mu^{\prime}}^{\sigma}\mathbf{e}_{\sigma}$ , then
$$
\begin{array}{l}
\nabla_{\mathbf {e}_{ eta}^{\prime}} \mathbf {e}_{\alpha}^{\prime} = \Gamma_{\alpha^{\prime}}^{	au^{\prime}} \mathbf {e}_{	au^{\prime}} = 
abla_{(\mathrm {L}_{ eta^{\prime}}^{\lambda} \mathbf {e}_{\lambda})} (\mathrm {L}_{\alpha^{\prime}}^{\mu} \mathbf {e}_{\mu}) = \mathrm {L}_{ eta^{\prime}}^{\lambda} 
abla_{\mathbf {e}_{\lambda}} (\mathrm {L}_{\alpha^{\prime}}^{\mu} \mathbf {e}_{\mu}) \\
= \mathrm {L}^{\lambda}_{ eta^{\prime}} \left(\mathrm {L}_{\alpha^{\prime}, \lambda}^{\mu} \mathrm {e}_{\mu} + \mathrm {L}_{\alpha^{\prime}}^{\mu} \Gamma_{\mu \lambda}^{	au} \mathrm {e}_{	au}\right) \\
= L^{\lambda}  eta^{\prime} \left(L^{\mu}_{\alpha^{\prime}, \lambda} L^{	au^{\prime}}_{\mu} e_{	au^{\prime}} + L^{\mu}_{\alpha^{\prime}} L^{	au^{\prime}}_{\gamma} \Gamma^{\gamma}_{\mu \lambda} e_{	au^{\prime}}\right), \\
\end {array},
$$
and therefore
$$
\Gamma_{\alpha}^{	au^{'}}  eta^{'} = \mathrm {L}_{ eta^{'}}^{\lambda} \mathrm {L}_{\alpha^{'}}^{\mu} \mathrm {L}_{\gamma}^{	au^{'}} \Gamma_{\mu \lambda}^{\gamma} + \mathrm {L}_{ eta^{'}}^{\lambda} \mathrm {L}_{\mu}^{	au^{'}} \mathrm {L}_{\alpha^{'}, \lambda}^{\mu}.
$$
The second term in this equation would not be present in a tensor transformation.
